name: Token Impersonation via PowerShell
notes: This rule detects adversaries leveraging Windows API functions related to token impersonation/theft.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE '%Invoke-TokenManipulation%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%ImpersonateNamedPipeClient%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%NtImpersonateThread%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%STARTUPINFOEX%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%UpdateProcThreadAttribute%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%AdjustTokenPrivileges%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%SeDebugPrivilege%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%DuplicateToken%' AND ("Command" ILIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%ImpersonateLoggedOnUser%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%CreateProcessWithToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%CreateProcessAsUser%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Token Impersonation via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE '%Invoke-TokenManipulation%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%ImpersonateNamedPipeClient%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%NtImpersonateThread%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%STARTUPINFOEX%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%UpdateProcThreadAttribute%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%AdjustTokenPrivileges%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%SeDebugPrivilege%') OR ("Command" ILIKE '%DuplicateToken%' AND ("Command" ILIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%ImpersonateLoggedOnUser%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%CreateProcessWithToken%' OR "Command" ILIKE '%CreateProcessAsUser%')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Token Impersonation via PowerShell
Event description: Detects adversaries leveraging Windows API functions related to token impersonation/theft.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
